name: hamch-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for power users — deep analytics, workflow tools, and more

plugins.name: insightful
plugins.description: Generate a comprehensive HTML insights report from your ENTIRE Claude Code history — every session, every project, all time. The built-in /insights covers recent activity; Insightful covers everything.

plugins.name: system-walkthrough
plugins.description: Point it at any codebase and get a complete Obsidian-compatible walkthrough with wikilinks. Autonomously reads through the code, maps the architecture, and produces interlinked documentation a senior dev could use to onboard.
